# J Scott Chapman
> AI product consultant. Builds software end-to-end, stays close to the people using it, and finds out whether it actually worked.

## About
- [Homepage](https://jscottchapman.com/): A short editorial-style intro: who I am, a few case studies, and recent notes.
- [Work](https://jscottchapman.com/work/): Full case studies. TechFix SMS, Morphose (HIPAA physical therapy), and a continuous glucose monitor visualization pipeline.
- [About](https://jscottchapman.com/about/): How I work, where it came from, and common questions.
- [Notes](https://jscottchapman.com/notes/): Short pieces on building, shipping, and AI tooling.
- [Skills](https://jscottchapman.com/skills/): Reusable Claude Code skills, free with an email.

## Key Facts
- Founder of Ravenview Services (2016–present)
- 10+ years building full-stack web applications
- Specializes in HIPAA-compliant healthcare platforms, medical device integrations, and AI/agentic systems
- Four AWS AI/ML certifications (2025)
- Conference speaker at Big Sky Dev Con and Carolina Code Conference
- Based in Missoula, Montana (Mountain Time)

## Notable Work
- TechFix SMS (2025): Personalized SMS engagement platform. Student engagement increased 100% year over year; 10 admin hours/week recovered.
- Morphose (2019–2022): HIPAA-compliant 3D physical therapy platform with 850+ exercise animations, sole developer.
- CGM Visualization (2019, at Estenda Solutions): Clinical dashboard for continuous glucose monitor data. BLE device-to-cloud pipeline.

## How I Work
- I close the loop: build, ship, measure, talk to whoever's using it, fix what was actually wrong.
- I work solo because the value lives in the gap between customer, code, and outcome, and that gap doesn't survive a handoff.
- I won't take on work where success is defined as "shipped" rather than "did the thing we said it would do."
